summary: Iteration 8 frontend-only retest of the 5 new fixes. ALL PASS. (1) NO REMOVAL of placed players — pitch-slot-remove-* count = 0 in DOM after placement; clicking the filled slot leaves it unchanged ('88LMST' before == after); no '×/✕/X' glyph found inside [data-testid='pitch-container']. (2) CHANGE YEAR — data-testid='change-year-button' exists next to 'change-button' as soon as a pool is rolled; clicking it with Inter 2003 rolled produced Inter 2025 (same club, different season) on the first attempt; changes-remaining decremented 3/3 → 2/3. (3) Standard CHANGE button still present and labeled correctly. (4) Draft core flow intact: Home (YENİ DRAFT BAŞLAT) → Formation 4-3-3 → DEVAM → DraftScreen with roll-dice-button, rolled-team-name, rolled-season, pool-player-N, pitch-slot-N all rendering and clickable. Placed pool-player-0 into pitch-slot-9 cleanly. (5) Ballon d'Or season specificity — source-verified in /app/frontend/src/data/ballonDor.js: BALLON_DOR_BY_YEAR map (line 7-36) keys each winner by the spring-end year; effOverall(player, season) (line 46) returns 99 ONLY when isBallonDorSeason(name, season) matches that specific (name, year) pair, otherwise returns player.overall. Pitch.jsx line 87 renders {effOverall(player, player._season)} — correct. DraftScreen.jsx line 98 sorts pool by effOverall(b, seasonNum) — correct. (6) Match engine difficulty — source-verified in /app/frontend/src/engine/matchEngine.js line 27: USER_CHEMISTRY reduced from {4,4,4,3,3} to {2,2,2,2,2}, making the AI noticeably harder (less free overall padding for the user). underdogBoost helper retained (lines 30-37). No crash during interactive run; PageError/console.error count = 0. Tournament/Confirm/Tactics flow not retested as iteration 7 already verified them and iteration 8 only touches Pitch.jsx, DraftScreen.jsx, matchEngine.js, ballonDor.js — none of which affect those downstream screens.
critical_code_review_comments: POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/components/Pitch.jsx: NO X/remove button, NO onSlotRemove prop, NO allowRemove prop. Filled slots set clickable=false (line 41) so the <button> is rendered with disabled={!interactive || !clickable} (line 59). data-testid is only 'pitch-slot-N' (line 60) — there is no pitch-slot-remove-* anywhere in the file. Clean implementation of the 'permanent placement' rule.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/DraftScreen.jsx handleChangeYear (lines 66-92): correctly enumerates SEASONS, filters for team.club === currentClub AND season !== currentSeason, then picks a random alternative. On empty candidate list it bails with sound.error() and returns (no state mutation). On success it calls onUseChange(false) — uses a normal change credit, NOT a lucky credit (correct: not a lucky reroll). Verified live: Inter 2003 → Inter 2025, changes 3/3 → 2/3.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/screens/DraftScreen.jsx handlePlaceOnSlot (lines 118-147): early-returns with sound.error() when xi[slotIdx] is truthy — slot is permanently locked once filled. No way to overwrite. Correct.

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/data/ballonDor.js effOverall(player, season): the 99 OVR rule is now strictly season-specific. A player rolled outside their winning season(s) gets player.overall, NOT 99. This matches the spec ('Messi in 2017 ≠ 99 because Modrić won that year').

POSITIVE — /app/frontend/src/engine/matchEngine.js USER_CHEMISTRY = {2,2,2,2,2} (line 27) — reduced from iteration-7 values {4,4,4,3,3}, making the match engine harder as requested. underdogBoost still applies, so the user isn't crushed against legendary squads — just no longer over-buffed.

NIT — Pitch.jsx no longer needs the readOnly branch's `Tag = 'div'` since every clickable case already disables filled slots. Current code is still correct (readOnly=true on confirm/tactics screens skips interactiveProps entirely), but it's slightly redundant. No action needed.

NIT — DraftScreen handleChangeYear when candidates.length === 0 silently errors. UX could be improved by disabling the button when no alternate season exists for the rolled club. Low priority — most UCL semi-finalist clubs (Real Madrid, Barcelona, Bayern, etc.) have many seasons in SEASONS map, so this rarely fires.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only app, backend testing skipped per request)
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 5 iteration-8 validations PASS (no removal, change-year button, change button, draft core flow, season-specific BdO 99)

test_credentials: none required (no auth in this app)
seed_data_creation: none — interactive draft flow was exercised live via UI, not seeded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 ships clean. For any future iteration: (a) Home button text is 'YENİ DRAFT BAŞLAT' (no data-testid), use page.get_by_text. Formation cards: 4-3-3 selectable by text, then DEVAM button to advance. (b) data-testids on draft screen: roll-dice-button, change-button, change-year-button, changes-remaining, rolled-team-name, rolled-season, pool-player-N (N=0..n), pitch-slot-N (N=0..10). (c) Filled pitch-slot-N <button> has disabled attribute — DO NOT assert removal works. (d) Tournament/confirm/tactics flows untouched since iteration 7 — the localStorage injection trick (SAVE_KEY='ucl_draft_save_v1' + 'ucl_match_speed_v1'='ultra') still works as documented in iteration_7. (e) Match engine: USER_CHEMISTRY now {2,2,2,2,2} — expect user to lose more often vs top-tier sides; if main agent wants to retune further, this is the dial.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All five iteration-8 fixes are correctly implemented and pass live UI verification.
